sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ مَوَاقِعُ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ النَّاسَ عَلَى التَّوَاصُلِ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: Društvene mreže pomažu ljudima da ostanu u stalnom kontaktu.
sentences.translationEn: Social media sites help people stay in constant communication.

sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ صُوَرَهُمْ وَأَخْبَارَهُمْ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici objavljuju svoje fotografije i vijesti s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Users post their photos and news with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ تَجْعَلُ الْعَالَمَ يَبْدُو كَقَرْيَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme čine da svijet izgleda kao veoma malo selo.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms make the world look like a very small village.
